headline: JPMorgan (JPM) Stock Still Looks Cheap As Its 141% Run Continues
summary: JPMorgan Chase stock has returned about 141% over the past five years, yet the latest Excess Returns intrinsic value estimate suggests the shares may still trade at a discount even as broader valuation checks flag that the stock is not a clear bargain. A roughly 141% five year gain can make JPMorgan Chase look fully priced at first glance, which raises the question of how much upside is left after such a strong run. Strong recent earnings momentum and planned capital returns through...
